objects.description: [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) has gathered details on their intended victims to aid in social engineering efforts for leveraging tailored themes of attacks.(Citation: FBI IC3 Flash VOID MANTICORE Handala Hack March 2026)
